info.longName: Innovator Equity Defined Protection ETF – 2 Yr to July 2027

funds_data.description: The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in FLexible EXchange® Options (“FLEX Options”) that reference the SPDR® S&P 500® ETF Trust (the “Underlying ETF”). FLEX Options are exchange-traded option contracts with uniquely customizable terms. The fund is non-diversified.
